Title: Complete hotel data
Body: Add hotel name, address, phone, Japanese address, nearest station, map link.

Title: Complete restaurants
Body: Add area, cuisine, must order, price, reservation need, hours, map link.

Title: Complete maps
Body: Add Google Maps links for hotels, restaurants, attractions, stations, bathrooms, meeting points.

Title: Test Money Hub
Body: Test /fx, converter, quick buttons, cash helper, offline fallback.

Title: Test Apple Wallet Suica
Body: Verify Suica instructions are clear for each traveler.

Title: Offline test
Body: Verify essentials work in Airplane Mode.

Title: Hilda usability test
Body: Have Hilda find Today, Hotel, Bathroom, Lost, SOS.

Title: Nick usability test
Body: Have Nick find Food, Shopping, Transit, Phrases.

Title: Search QA
Body: Search ramen, bathroom, suica, hotel, Narita, rain, emergency.

Title: Emergency content review
Body: Review SOS, Lost Mode, medical/help cards, hotel taxi card.

Title: PWA install test
Body: Install on each iPhone and verify standalone launch.

Title: Content freeze
Body: Freeze features before trip; only content and bug fixes after this point.
